title: Building RAG & Vector Search on AWS Bedrock

timeline.label: RAG Core Architectures
timeline.text: Understanding Retrieval-Augmented Generation vs model fine-tuning. Why RAG solves hallucination.

timeline.label: Vector Embeddings Generation
timeline.text: Generating vector float arrays from text blocks using Amazon Titan Text Embeddings.

timeline.label: Ingestion & Chunking Pipelines
timeline.text: Building recursive character split chunking scripts and loading records into a vector database.

timeline.label: Vector Similarity Search
timeline.text: Querying the database with a user question embedding and retrieving top K matching records.

timeline.label: Context Injection & Synthesis
timeline.text: Assembling retrieved text blocks inside system guidelines to output verified facts.
